title: For the choirmaster. With stringed instruments. A Maskil of David. When the Ziphites went to Saul and said, “Is David not hiding among us?”

verses.1: Save me, O God, by Your name, and vindicate me by Your might!
verses.2: Hear my prayer, O God; listen to the words of my mouth.
verses.3: For strangers rise up against me, and ruthless men seek my life—men with no regard for God. Selah
verses.4: Surely God is my helper; the Lord is the sustainer of my soul.
verses.5: He will reward my enemies with evil. In Your faithfulness, destroy them.
verses.6: Freely I will sacrifice to You; I will praise Your name, O LORD, for it is good.
verses.7: For He has delivered me from every trouble, and my eyes have looked in triumph on my foes.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
